questionHtml: Outline the role of methanogenic archaeans in the movement of carbon in ecosystems.
markschemeHtml:
a. methane produced from organic matter;

b. in anaerobic conditions;

c. methane diffuses into atmosphere/accumulates in ground/soil;

d. oxidized/converted to carbon dioxide (in atmosphere);

meta.title: Outline the role of methanogenic archaeans in the movement of carbon in ecosystems.
